plugins.name: luly-v0-3-2
plugins.description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.3.2 (patch): fix a v0.3.1 regression — the validator required body.theme.layout, but the assembler now omits it for default flows, so every flow without layout overrides failed validation. Validator now treats layout as optional (shape-checked only when present), matching assembler + renderer. v0.3.1 (minor): layout-token fix — flow layout overrides use the renderer's maxWidthDesktop/paddingDesktop (+ *Mobile) keys; the dead bare maxWidth default is dropped (flows keep the app default 1480px width). Color application — luly-style documents quiz answer-card token roles (onSurface/primaryLight/successLight/failureLight) and dark-callout secondary, with contrast targets for legible answer text. Per-viewport awareness — *Mobile style tokens and per-block margins documented as agentic-edit polishing levers, not emitted in simple generation.
